mentions.note: Up 50%+ from April lows; simplifying to pure-play utility with 7-9% EPS growth; Texas electricity demand growing 3x national average; LNG portfolio expanding with KKR partnership; compelling growth-and-income combination.
Utility selling majority infrastructure stake to KKR. Still liked for regulated utility safety and some LNG upside, but better LNG plays exist (Cheniere, Venture Global).
